description: To enhance a listing's marketing, an agent wants to create a 3D virtual tour.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a 3D camera operator (e.g., Matterport provider) to scan the property.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully books a vendor to create the tour.

nodes.task_description: Receive the completed virtual tour link from the vendor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the URL for the virtual tour.

nodes.task_description: Add the virtual tour link to the MLS listing and other marketing materials.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the listing with the new tour.
